Action: Issuer exposes OAuth authorization server endpoint; Application retrieves well-known OAuth configuration
Data:
- GET request to .well-known/oauth-authorization-server endpoint
- Issuer service instance
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with OpenIdConfiguration object

Action: Validate OAuth authorization server configuration structure
Data:
- OpenIdConfiguration containing: issuer, tokenEndpoint
- Expected base URL: http://default-issuer-url.admin.ch
- Expected token endpoint: http://default-issuer-url.admin.ch/oid4vci/api/token
Expected Result: issuer is not null and starts with expected base URL; tokenEndpoint is not null and equals expected token endpoint URL

Action: Confirm OAuth configuration aligns with OID4VCI authorization flow expectations
Data:
- OAuth authorization configuration
- OID4VCI compliance check
Expected Result: OAuth and OpenID configurations are consistent and match expected OID4VCI token endpoint
